title: Booking.com Promotion
description: Represents a promotional offer on Booking.com, including deals, discounts, and special rates that properties use to attract travelers and increase bookings.

hotel_id.description: Booking.com property identifier this promotion applies to

discount_percentage.description: Discount percentage applied to the parent rate

bookable_from.description: Start date from which the promotion can be booked

bookable_until.description: End date until which the promotion can be booked

stay_from.description: Earliest check-in date for stays using this promotion

stay_until.description: Latest check-out date for stays using this promotion

min_advance_days.description: Minimum number of days in advance the booking must be made

max_advance_days.description: Maximum number of days in advance the booking can be made

min_stay_nights.description: Minimum number of nights required for the stay

applicable_rooms.description: Room type IDs this promotion applies to; empty means all rooms

applicable_rates.description: Rate plan IDs this promotion applies to; empty means all rates

target_countries.description: Country codes eligible for this promotion (country_rate type only)

target_devices.description: Device types eligible for this promotion (mobile_rate type only)

campaign_name.description: Name of the campaign (campaign_deal type only)

created_at.description: Timestamp when the promotion was created

modified_at.description: Timestamp when the promotion was last modified
